purpose: ties inspect-first recovery to the pull provenance handoff and the fresh-live revalidation boundary

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

recovery_boundary.journal: reads durable claim, lease, and fencing evidence without authorizing mutation
recovery_boundary.inspect: classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block before any mutating repair
recovery_boundary.mutate: may run only after inspect and fresh live hashes prove the action safe

liveness_boundary.apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
liveness_boundary.journal: remains read-only even when recovery is needed

auth_boundary.read_only: may stay on the existing HMAC family
auth_boundary.floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage

required_invariants: pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
